# excelkospi

> excelkospi is a Korean web app for checking stock, ETF, crypto, news, and community discussion while the page visually resembles a spreadsheet or office document.

## Canonical pages

- Home: https://excelkospi.pages.dev/
- Guide: https://excelkospi.pages.dev/guide
- Sitemap: https://excelkospi.pages.dev/sitemap.xml

## What users can do

- View Korean market, US market, and crypto prices in a spreadsheet-style dashboard.
- Switch between daily, 15-minute, and 30-minute movement views.
- Check pre-market and after-hours status where available.
- Read market news and community discussions in Korean.
- Browse Korean-listed ETFs with search, quick filters, and top holdings.
- Open TradingView charts for supported US stocks and crypto.
- Add custom watchlist rows, blank note rows, holdings, quantities, and average prices.
- Share a watchlist backup URL across desktop and mobile devices.
- Use a discreet office-style mode, including spreadsheet and Outlook-like layouts.

## Important Korean search phrases

- 엑셀 보는 척 주식 보기
- 회사에서 주식 보기
- 실시간 국장 미장 시세
- 코스피 코스닥 나스닥 비트코인 김프
- 주식 뉴스 종목토론방
- ETF 탐색기
- TradingView 차트
- 평단가 보유 손익 계산

## Notes

- Primary language: Korean (ko-KR).
- The service is not affiliated with Microsoft, Excel, Outlook, TradingView, or any exchange.
- Contact: excelkospi@outlook.com
